parameters.initialMessages: Hi — I'm the CDPI agent. Ask me about DPI architecture (technical advisory notes, standards, wallets, trust infrastructure) or programme adoption (pitch decks, rollout strategy, inclusion).

options.title: CDPI Agent
options.subtitle: Senior Technical Architect + Programs & Operations Officer

parameters.jsCode:
// PLACEHOLDER — replaced by scripts/build_and_import.py at build time
return [];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 10, temperature: 0, system: $json.routerPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ output: '**[' + $('Build Main Request').first().json.persona.toUpperCase() + ']**\n\n' + (($json.content && $json.content[0] && $json.content[0].text) || ''), persona: $('Build Main Request').first().json.persona, answer: ($json.content && $json.content[0] && $json.content[0].text) || '', conversationId: $('Build Main Request').first().json.conversationId }) }}
